insight_events.title: Core business decelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (operating income, revenues) are decelerating together — growth moved from -2.9% to -62.8% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
